calendar.title: Schedule
calendar.settings_required_desc: To use the schedule feature, Google Calendar settings must be completed.
calendar.auth_required_desc: Google Calendar permission is required to use the schedule feature.
calendar.backend_offline: Server is offline. Please try again later.
calendar.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this event?
calendar.copy_success_desc: User and calendar info copied to clipboard as JSON.
calendar.copy_fail_desc: An error occurred while copying to clipboard.

auth.login_desc: Please login to use this screen.
auth.google_login_disabled_desc: Google account login is temporarily disabled right now.

chat.locked_placeholder: Log in to type a message.
chat.home_desc: Send a message to start a new session.
chat.error_fallback: Failed to get a response. Please try again later.
chat.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this session?
chat.delete_all_desc: All chat history will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
chat.copy_fail_desc: An error occurred while copying chat payload.
chat.leave_while_waiting: A response is still pending. If you leave this screen, you may miss the in-progress result. Do you want to continue?
chat.hitl_question: Do you want to execute the next task?
chat.hitl_update_question: Please review and update the following information.
presets: What kind of things can you do?
Please tell me my schedule for this month.
Add an evening haircut to my todos.
Leave a memo to call my parents.
Find the haircut todo and edit it.

settings.title: Settings
settings.calendar_desc: Sync and manage your schedule by connecting your Google account.
settings.google_auth_desc: Permissions are needed to fetch Google Calendar events.
settings.empty_calendars: Calendar list is empty or loading...
settings.password_desc: Enter your new password and click change.
settings.language_desc: Select the display language for the application.
settings.security_desc: Manage account security and login sessions.

todo.title: Todo
todo.input_placeholder: Enter a task and press Enter...
todo.empty_subtext: Try adding a new task using the input field above.
todo.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
todo.toast_add_error_desc: An error occurred while adding the task.
todo.toast_update_error_desc: An error occurred while updating the task.
todo.toast_delete_error_desc: An error occurred while deleting the task.
todo.toast_status_error_desc: An error occurred while changing status.

memo.title: Memo
memo.desc: Freely record your important thoughts and tasks.
memo.empty_text: No search results or memos are empty.
memo.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?

knowledge.title: Knowledge Management
knowledge.desc_placeholder: Enter a detailed description of the knowledge
knowledge.list_empty_subtext: Click the Add button at the top right to create one.
knowledge.rag_enabled_description: When disabled, this collection is excluded from RAG retrieval.
knowledge.delete_disabled_tooltip: Deletion is unavailable until processing is done.
knowledge.rag_disabled_tooltip: RAG options cannot be changed until processing is done.
knowledge.file_empty: No knowledge data has been uploaded.
knowledge.file_empty_subtext: Use the Upload button at the top right to add a file.
knowledge.toast_upload_error_desc: An error occurred while uploading the file.
knowledge.toast_download_error_desc: An error occurred while downloading the file.
knowledge.toast_source_action_unsupported_desc: Knowledge add, edit, upload, delete, and RAG on/off changes are not supported in the deployed environment. Please contact your administrator.
knowledge.toast_delete_source_error_desc: An error occurred while deleting the file.
knowledge.toast_retry_source_error_desc: An error occurred while retrying the source.
knowledge.toast_toggle_source_error_desc: An error occurred while changing the source on/off state.
knowledge.toast_update_knowledge_error_desc: An error occurred while updating the knowledge information.
